Name: Jinelle Esther
Info: Jinelle joined the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders in 2019 and has become one of the squad's most recognized performers.

Name: Kelcey Wetterberg
Info: Kelcey is one of the longest-tenured cheerleaders on the squad and serves as a squad point leader.

Name: Victoria Kalina
Info: Victoria joined the DCC in 2021 and quickly became a fan favorite with her high-energy performances.

Name: Reece Wiersma
Info: Reece is a valued member of the show group and has performed at numerous special events.

Name: Cianna Wilson
Info: Cianna has represented the Cowboys at the Pro Bowl and serves as a squad point leader.

Name: Kat Dodd
Info: Kat joined the squad in 2022 and brings incredible energy and talent to every performance.

Name: Lexie Doyle
Info: Lexie is a dynamic performer and integral part of the Cowboys Cheerleaders show group.

Name: Madeline James
Info: Madeline joined the squad in 2023 as a highly sought-after rookie with exceptional dance training.

Name: Hannah Rhoades
Info: Hannah is a fan favorite who frequently represents the Cowboys at community events.

Name: Tess Brophy
Info: Tess was featured prominently in the CMT series Making the Team during her rookie year.
